reflection.summary: Legitimate greeting exchange with no user task to complete.
lessons: Not all messages warrant enthusiasm — after 14 hours AFK, the greeting risks coming across as performative rather than appropriate.
Recognize that 'hello' alone isn't a task. Don't invite without purpose.
recommendations: Use brief, low-friction greeting responses to open-ended 'hello' rather than emoji-heavy enthusiastic replies.
Wait for task description before offering help.
